message:
test(vc_knowledge): add proptest property-based tests

Adds proptest roundtrip tests for Solution and Gotcha types:
- test_solution_roundtrip: Verifies serialization invariants
- test_gotcha_roundtrip: Verifies serialization invariants

Property-based testing catches edge cases that unit tests miss,
such as unicode handling, empty strings, and boundary values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
